narrative:
Ohio Twp township has 3,782 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.4 percentage points.
